description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build MATLAB Packages that can be triggered manually with an optional Ice version input or called by another workflow with an optional ice_version input. The workflow should run on both ubuntu-24.04 and windows-2022, checking out the repository, setting up C++, MATLAB, and cache. It should then conditionally set the Ice package version, build the MATLAB toolbox for Linux or Windows, collect files to sign on Windows, sign C++ binaries on Windows using Azure trusted signing, package the Windows MATLAB toolbox, and upload the resulting MATLAB packages as artifacts.
